scope.selection_note: Codex-only identity cleanup prep after identity190. Restricted to route and corridor aliases only. identity192 already found no safe new route/corridor aliases; this pass rechecked the current live validation surface and kept the same conservative posture.

candidate_limit.requested: up to 6 very high-confidence route/corridor aliases if possible
candidate_limit.note: No current route or corridor duplicate row cleared the SBS/local/limited/express variant, route-bundle, branch/direction, corridor-extent, merge-target-chain, or borough/scope guards.

scope.write_limit: Exactly one artifact was written: data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch195-prep.json. No merges.json, LOG.md, manifest, submissions, canonical JSONL, canonical DB, materialized outputs, wiki files, or provider-backed commands were edited or used.

validate_repo_duplicate_global_identity.method: Read-only validateRepo() via bun --eval over current canonical JSONL plus current identity overrides.
route_or_corridor_messages_sample: Global corridor records corridor_125th-st-crosstown-brt-phase2 and corridor_125th-st-manhattan share identity key corridor_125th-st-crosstown-corridor.
Global corridor records corridor_broadway-manhattan-upper and corridor_bus-fwd-2-broadway-bronx-local share identity key corridor_broadway.
Global route records route_23rd-st-sbs and route_m23-local-cb4-apr2016 share identity key route_m23.
Global route records route_b44-brt-phase2 and route_b44-sbs share identity key route_b44.
Global route records route_m34-local-2011 and route_m34-sbs share identity key route_m34.

merge_target_chain_collapse.note: No aliases are proposed, so no existing merge target is reused. Many live route/corridor duplicate records are already merge targets, which increases chain-collapse risk and supports deferral rather than a new alias.

not_repeated.reason: Still appears in live route duplicate rows, but it was already prepared earlier and is not repeated here.
Still appears in live route duplicate rows, but it was already prepared earlier and is not repeated here.

prior_unsafe_guard_reconfirmed.reason: Previously excluded because the safe lifecycle direction would require collapsing a current merge target and the reverse would collapse an SBS record into a local target. Current canonical payloads still distinguish M23-SBS from M23 local.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_23rd-st-sbs and route_m23-local-cb4-apr2016 share identity key route_m23.
source_or_payload_evidence: route_23rd-st-sbs payload route_type_normalized=select_bus_service and service_variant=sbs.
route_m23-local-cb4-apr2016 payload route_type_normalized=local and service_variant=local.
deferred.reason: Deferred for SBS/local lifecycle and merge-target-chain risk. Shared M23 number is not enough to collapse local and SBS route records in this batch.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: route_m34-local-2011 collides with route_m34-sbs and route_m34a-sbs on route_m34.
source_or_payload_evidence: route_m34-local-2011 is local service.
route_m34-sbs and route_m34a-sbs are SBS records, and M34A is a distinct route label.
deferred.reason: Deferred for local/SBS and route-label mismatch. M34 local, M34 SBS, and M34A SBS should not be collapsed from a shared base route key.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: route_b44-brt-phase2 collides with route_b44-limited and route_b44-sbs on route_b44.
source_or_payload_evidence: route_b44-limited is a limited-stop predecessor record.
route_b44-sbs is the SBS record.
route_b44-brt-phase2 -> route_b44-sbs was already prepared in identity182 and is not repeated.
deferred.reason: Deferred to avoid duplicating a prior prep and to avoid collapsing generic Phase II, limited, and SBS variants without a fresh acyclic chain plan.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity reports shared base route keys for B103 and B82 records.
source_or_payload_evidence: The colliding records explicitly include limited, local, and express variants.
deferred.reason: Deferred for service variant mismatch. Shared base route number is not sufficient for local, limited, express, or proposed-draft route identity.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity reports B46 and Bx41 route-key collisions across bundled, limited, local, and SBS records.
source_or_payload_evidence: B46 candidate includes a local-and-limited bundled record and a B46+ SBS record.
Bx41 candidates include limited, local, and BX41+ SBS records.
deferred.reason: Deferred for route-variant and route-bundle risk. Current evidence does not justify collapsing bundled local/limited records into SBS or local/limited records into each other.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_bx40-bx42-tremont-cb5-2024 and route_bx42-tremont-cab1 share identity key route_bx42.
source_or_payload_evidence: route_bx40-bx42-tremont-cb5-2024 is a Bx40/42 bundled record.
route_bx42-tremont-cab1 is a single Bx42 record.
deferred.reason: Deferred for route-bundle guard. Do not collapse a Bx40/Bx42 bundle into a single Bx42 route.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity reports Q44, Q52, Q53, and Bx55 route-key collisions.
source_or_payload_evidence: Q44 collision crosses local/pre-SBS and Q44+ SBS contexts.
Q52/Q53 collision crosses bundled proposed SBS and single-route SBS records.
Q53 and Bx55 LGA records are participant-identified LaGuardia access ideas, not implemented service clusters.
deferred.reason: Deferred for SBS/pre-SBS, bundle/single-route, and participant-idea context mismatch.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_m14-ad-sbs and route_m14-brt-phase2 share identity key route_m14.
source_or_payload_evidence: route_m14-brt-phase2 is a generic Phase II M14 route mention.
route_m14-ad-sbs is M14 A/D SBS.
route_m14-brt-phase2 -> route_m14-ad-sbs was already prepared in identity179 and is not repeated.
deferred.reason: Deferred because the plausible alias was already prepared earlier; no duplicate proposal is made in batch195.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global corridor records corridor_broadway-manhattan-upper and corridor_bus-fwd-2-broadway-bronx-local share identity key corridor_broadway.
source_or_payload_evidence: corridor_broadway-manhattan-upper borough=Manhattan, limits=157th Street to 220th Street.
corridor_bus-fwd-2-broadway-bronx-local borough=Bronx, from W 225th St to W 231st St.
deferred.reason: Deferred for borough mismatch and distinct corridor limits.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity reports 125th Street and 14th Street crosstown corridor collisions.
source_or_payload_evidence: Phase II crosstown records are broad candidate corridors.
125th Street target has Morningside Avenue to Second Avenue limits.
14th Street TTP target has direction-specific 3rd/8th/9th Avenue operating limits.
deferred.reason: Deferred for broad-candidate versus specific operational corridor extent mismatch.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity reports Church Avenue and Cropsey Avenue corridor collisions.
source_or_payload_evidence: Church Avenue records differ between Coney Island-to-Flatbush, Flatbush-to-Ocean Parkway, and an unlabeled SBS candidate.
Bay Parkway/Cropsey is a two-street study area, while the Cropsey candidate is a Cropsey-only B82 segment.
deferred.reason: Deferred for corridor extent and multi-corridor bundle mismatch.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity reports multiple Cross Bay Boulevard collisions.
source_or_payload_evidence: Cross Bay records include north of 165 Av, Liberty/109 Av, Rockaway Boulevard to 165 Avenue, and broader Woodhaven/Cross Bay corridor contexts.
deferred.reason: Deferred for whole-corridor versus subsegment and distinct-limit mismatch.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity reports B82 Southern Brooklyn, Kings Highway, and Flatlands Avenue collisions.
source_or_payload_evidence: B82 Southern Brooklyn is a larger Kings Highway/Flatlands corridor.
Kings Highway records cite distinct Bay Parkway/Ocean/E 23/Ave K/McDonald/spot-location limits.
Flatlands records cite E 103 St to Pennsylvania Ave versus Ave I to Ralph Ave.
deferred.reason: Deferred for larger B82 corridor versus distinct street subsegments.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity reports Lexington Avenue, Third Avenue, and Woodhaven Boulevard street-name collisions.
source_or_payload_evidence: Lexington records differ between at 125th Street, 96th-to-60th, and 60th-to-52nd contexts.
Third Avenue records have adjacent but distinct limits: 36th to 55th and 55th to 57th.
Woodhaven records include broad Phase II, Dry Harbor-to-Metropolitan, Union Turnpike-to-81st Road, and Queens Boulevard-to-107th Avenue contexts.
deferred.reason: Deferred because shared street names are not same corridor identities without matching extents.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity: Global corridor records corridor_meeting-doc-109341-montauk-branch-amityville-babylon and corridor_meeting-doc-109341-montauk-branch-babylon-sayville share identity key corridor_montauk-branch.
source_or_payload_evidence: One corridor is Amityville to Babylon.
The other corridor is Babylon to Sayville.
deferred.reason: Deferred for same branch but different bounded work segments.

validator_evidence: validateRepo duplicate_global_identity reports multiple Utica Avenue corridor key collisions.
source_or_payload_evidence: Records mix a broad BRT/B46 corridor, a Phase II candidate, and narrower Carroll/St. Johns-to-Church contexts.
deferred.reason: Deferred for broad corridor versus narrower bus-priority segment mismatch.

blockers: No new route/corridor alias cleared all requested guards after identity192's zero-count route/corridor pass.
Remaining live route duplicate rows are dominated by SBS/local/limited/express variants, route bundles, participant-idea route mentions, or prior-prepared aliases.
Remaining live corridor duplicate rows are dominated by street-name collisions with explicit extent, borough, branch-segment, or whole-corridor/subsegment mismatches.

Several tempting records are already merge targets in current overrides, so any proposal would require an explicit acyclic same-scope cluster-collapse proof; no such cluster was decisive in this pass.

inspections.purpose: Reviewed recent identity prep artifacts and confirmed identity192 already produced a zero-count route/corridor pass.
Read-only live validation scan for duplicate_global_identity issues restricted to Global route/corridor records.
Collected current route/corridor payload summaries plus merge and do-not-merge override counts for guard review.
Checked likely candidates against prior Codex prep and deferred artifacts to avoid re-proposing already prepared aliases.

conductor_apply_note: Do not apply any route or corridor aliases from this artifact. Re-run validation after other identity work; if these pairs remain, they are better candidates for do-not-merge review, identity-key refinement, or a separate explicit chain-collapse review than for a Codex-only merge batch.
